perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a bucket hat and a striped off-the-shoulder top is in a Don Don Donki store, looking at pink and orange bags of cotton candy on a shelf. (2) Close-ups show the packaging of the 'Wata-gashi' cotton candy, specifically highlighting the mango and strawberry flavors. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room where the same woman and a second woman in a blue sweater are sitting at a table. (4) They open the bags, pull out large, fluffy pieces of cotton candy, and tear them apart to reveal real fruit pulp inside. (5) They eat the cotton candy, showing expressive facial expressions of delight and surprise while pointing at the ingredients.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Two high-pitched female voices speak excitedly in Mandarin with an upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background music. (2) As the scene changes to the tasting, the vocals remain central, describing the texture and flavor of the fruit. (3) Cartoon-style sound effects (pop, ding, sparkle) play at key moments when text appears or fruit is revealed. (4) The music maintains a constant high energy until the very end where one speaker shouts a final recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '真果實棉花糖 / 口感超夢幻' (Real fruit cotton candy / Texture is super dreamy) - Decorative Hook. (2) '真的水果果肉' (Real fruit pulp) - Decorative Effect. (3) '49元' (49 Yuan) - Functional price info. (4) '你毀了我的食慾' (You ruined my appetite) - Decorative/Humorous caption. (5) Full functional subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Discovery -> Product Detail Close-ups -> Home Testing & Review -> Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing throughout the store and home segments.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair, a bucket hat, and a striped off-the-shoulder top; another woman with long dark hair and a blue turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a densely packed retail aisle in a Don Don Donki store with various snacks. The second scene is a modern, brightly lit home interior with a table and soft background decor.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting mixed with retail fluorescent lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic and detailed product review of fruit-filled cotton candy from Don Don Donki, emphasizing the unique texture and inclusion of real fruit pulp to encourage viewers to purchase the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct instruction to 'Go buy it' at the end and focus on a specific retail chain.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style editing with large colorful text hooks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'treasure hunting' aspect of shopping at Don Don Donki to engage foodies and snack lovers.
